title: Fantasy Beyond
body:
![main title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90f954a5e929d81006b323e17ad94d027cae1279.png)
This mod aims to convert the game on a RPG game implementing some mechanics like character creation, races, a brand new magic system, player stats and more things.

**Disclaimer: This mod is an early access so the content is not fully implemented, at this point, the only implemented thing is the character creation with different races and the new HUD.**

![races title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9adc72eacd9644e20908fec915ce77b0d50d04b0_0.webp)
- Dwarf: small creatures similar to humans with more resistance but they are slower.
- Elf: they are good detecting enemies because of their enhanced senses.
- Human: they are known because of his abilities with the weapons to attack faster than others.
- Merfolk: water creatures that can breath outside for a few minutes and swim faster than others.
- Orc: they are big and strong but you can't enter in small places.
- Tiefling: hell creatures that can resist fire and lava.
